channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's God, guns and anticommunist Fourth of July
item.description: President Trump emphasized American military strength, a Christian nation, and his top legislative goal during a delayed Fourth of July address at the National...

item.title: Americans of all ages are socializing less than before
item.description: Data from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics indicates Americans are spending less time socializing than two decades ago.

item.title: McMorrow suspends Michigan Senate campaign in surprise move
item.description: Michigan state Sen. Mallory McMorrow announced she is suspending her U.S. Senate campaign, narrowing the Democratic primary field.

item.title: FIFA clears Balogun to play for USMNT against Belgium
item.description: FIFA suspended Folarin Balogun's one-game ban, allowing the U.S. striker to play in Monday's World Cup match against Belgium.
